title: Zacatecoluca Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zacatecoluca, with a Z-Score of +4.40. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Zacatecoluca are extremely hot, with a high temperature anomaly. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no significant relief in sight, and a high CDD of 14.4 GG. 
 The humidity is at 58% and the wind speed is 12.4 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
